acceptance_criteria: CLI warns when creating non-chore tasks without linked requirements
Daemon auto-assigns tasks to agents when starting workflows
Error handling, retries, and observability are addressed in implementation
Automated test coverage for traceability warnings and auto-assignment
description: 47% of tasks have no linked requirements. All tasks are unassigned. The dependency system exists but is never used. Improve traceability from tasks to product goals and track who/what performs the work.
title: Strengthen task-to-requirement traceability and accountability
